name: Sanjeevani
description: Multi-agent health intelligence system — private health cognition to trustworthy public action

agents.name: DRISHTI
agents.description: Extracts structured health data from PDFs and images of lab reports, prescriptions, and discharge summaries

agents.name: BODHI
agents.description: 5-step reasoning chain that discovers patterns, trends, family risk overlays, and drug interactions across all documents

agents.name: MUDRA
agents.description: Validates health claims, maps to ICD-10 codes, generates evidence hashes, and prepares onchain attestations with consent summaries

agents.name: SETU
agents.description: Bridges patients to researchers by generating matchability profiles and ranking attestations against research criteria
